title: Pink Mania
description: Minecraft with more pink in it
body:
Various recoloring and changes of texture in pink theme.



This resource pack change various feature (hud, blocks, items) into a pink theme version.





The perfect resource pack for those in love with the pink color !



Blocks changed :



-Beacon

-Grass

-Acacia and Oak leaves



Items :



-Diamond sword, pickaxe, hoe, shovel

- Clock

-Golden apple and carrot
